---
title: 'START HERE'
date: '2024-01-10T06:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Topos Creative, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6325028292046485150'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here_9.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Creative, LLC/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="text-align: left;"><i>Experience with: Google Sheets, Excel, SQL, R, Python, Tableau, Power BI, GitHub, Visual Studio Code, RStudio, AI Prompts (ChatGPT, Perplexity AI, etc.) and Data Analyst Business Intelligence Analyst best practices.&nbsp;</i></h4><h3>Darrell Wolfe, Topos Creative, LLC</h3><h3><p style="font-size: medium; font-weight: 400;"></p><blockquote style="font-size: medium; font-weight: 400;"><p>I simplify complicated geeky things &amp; rebuild systems of operation for efficiency and automation.</p></blockquote><p><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-4bbb11fffe32.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;</span><img alt="Topos Creative LLC" border="0" data-original-height="413" data-original-width="663" height="198" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-96a9f488f473.jpg" title="Topos Creative LLC" width="320" /></a></p></h3><h4>Let me help you wrangle your data:</h4><p>Are you a small business owner looking to streamline your operations, manage your finances, or organize your data more effectively? Look no further! I offer professional Microsoft Excel services tailored specifically to the needs of local small businesses like yours.</p><p><br /></p><h4>What I Can Do for You:</h4><p></p><ul><li><b>Custom Spreadsheets: </b>Create or optimize spreadsheets to help you track expenses, manage inventory, or analyze sales data.</li><li><b>Data Analysis:</b> Turn your raw data into actionable insights with pivot tables, charts, and other Excel tools.</li><li><b>Reporting:</b> Generate clear, concise reports that give you a snapshot of your businessâ€™s performance.</li><li><b>Automation</b>: Save time by automating repetitive tasks with Excel macros or formulas.</li><li><b>Budgeting &amp; Forecasting</b>: Develop financial models to plan your budget or forecast future trends.</li><li><b>Troubleshooting</b>: Fix any issues youâ€™re having with your current Excel setup, from broken formulas to slow performance.</li></ul><div><br /></div><div><h4><strong>How We Work</strong></h4><ol><li><strong>Consultation</strong>: Our journey begins with understanding your goals. Whether it's a data visualization project, a creative endeavor, or personal growth, we tailor our approach to your specific needs.</li><li><strong>Collaboration</strong>: We believe in the power of partnership. Working together, we'll develop a plan that leverages your strengths and addresses your challenges.</li><li><strong>Creation</strong>: With a clear strategy in place, we bring your vision to life, ensuring that the final product not only meets but exceeds your expectations.</li></ol><div><br /></div></div><p></p><h4>Contact Information:&nbsp;</h4><p>Donâ€™t let Excel headaches slow you down. Reach out today to discuss your specific needs and how I can help your business thrive!</p><p>Darrell G Wolfe, 208-907-1617,&nbsp;<a href="mailto:Me@DarrellWolfe.com" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Me@DarrellWolfe.com</a></p><p>I work remotely but I have limited availability for in-person meetings in the Coeur dAlene/Spokane Valley region.</p><p>Connect with me work on:</p><p></p><ul><li><a href="https://linktr.ee/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">LinkTree</a></li><li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/darrellgwolfe/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li><li><a href="https://github.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">GitHub</a></li><li><a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/darrell.wolfe" target="_blank">Tableau Public</a></li><li><a href="https://www.hackerrank.com/profile/darrellwolfe" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">HackerRank Profile</a></li></ul><h3><br /></h3><h4><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/received-305211592192134-3eb67aff31bf.jpeg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1000" data-original-width="1000" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/received-305211592192134-78be80bf5d84.jpeg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">PS: What is Topos?&nbsp;</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><em style="font-weight: 400; text-align: left;">At Topos Creative, we believe in the power of strategic positioning for unlocking opportunities and influencing positive change. The Greek word "Topos" reflects this philosophy, and it's the core of what we do: helping you excel in your unique calling.</em></div></h4>
<!--notionvc: 692f061b-844c-4780-bec4-a6a011f3f424-->
